measures.title: Property Tax Levy for Fire Protection and Emergency Medical Services
measures.what_it_does: Restores the fire district's regular levy with a 104% limit factor for three years (Resolution 414).
measures.cost_line: Up to $1.48 per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.jurisdiction: Mason County Fire Protection District No. 12 (Matlock)
measures.title: Renewal and Increase of Emergency Medical Services Levy
measures.what_it_does: Renews and increases the district's EMS levy for six years, 2027 through 2032.
measures.cost_line: Up to $0.50 per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.title: Emergency Medical Services Property Tax Levy
measures.what_it_does: Continues the fire authority's EMS levy for six years.
measures.cost_line: Up to $0.50 per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.
